checkpoint: Display height should be 1/6 the distance to the furthest viewer
validation_question: Is the bottom of the display at least 48" from floor, and height appropriate for viewing distance?

checkpoint: Minimum viewing distance should not exceed 8x the display height for 1080p
validation_question: Is the furthest viewer within 8x display height for HD content?

checkpoint: Minimum viewing distance should not exceed 4x the display height for 4K
validation_question: Is the furthest viewer within 4x display height for 4K content?

checkpoint: Microphone pickup pattern must match room geometry
validation_question: Does the microphone coverage pattern match the talk zone?

checkpoint: Sound reinforcement should achieve NC-30 or better for lecture halls
validation_question: Is the ambient noise level NC-30 or below?

checkpoint: Sound reinforcement should achieve NC-35 or better for classrooms
validation_question: Is the ambient noise level NC-35 or below?

checkpoint: Cable pathway capacity should be 40% fill maximum
validation_question: Is the cable pathway filled to no more than 40% capacity?

checkpoint: Sight lines must be unobstructed for all viewers
validation_question: Does every seat have a clear view of the primary display/projection?

checkpoint: Projector throw ratio must accommodate room depth
validation_question: Is the projector throw ratio appropriate for the screen size and distance?

checkpoint: Concurrent interpreter booths require dedicated audio feeds
validation_question: Are interpreter booth positions and feeds planned if needed?

checkpoint: Rack thermal management requires 1RU blank space above heat-generating equipment
validation_question: Is there a 1RU blank above each processor/amplifier?

checkpoint: All metal racks must be grounded to building ground
validation_question: Is the rack bonded to the building ground system?

checkpoint: Cable labeling must identify both ends and be machine-printed
validation_question: Are all cables labeled at both ends with consistent naming?

checkpoint: Service loops must be provided at each device termination
validation_question: Is there a 6-12"" service loop at each cable termination?"

checkpoint: Power sequencing must prevent transients during startup/shutdown
validation_question: Is there a power sequencer or delayed startup for amplifiers?

checkpoint: Structured cabling must follow TIA-568 standards
validation_question: Are all network cables terminated to TIA-568B standard?

checkpoint: Fiber optic cables must have minimum bend radius of 10x cable diameter
validation_question: Are fiber bend radius requirements maintained throughout?

checkpoint: Dress covers must be installed on all rack cable entries
validation_question: Are cable entry points covered with brush strips or grommets?

checkpoint: Speech intelligibility STI should be 0.6 or higher
validation_question: Is the STI measurement 0.6 or above?

checkpoint: Sound pressure level should be 70-75 dBA for normal speech
validation_question: Is the SPL at the listener position 70-75 dBA?

checkpoint: Video display brightness should be 350 cd/m2 minimum for controlled lighting
validation_question: Is the display brightness at least 350 cd/m2?

checkpoint: Video display contrast ratio should be 4000:1 minimum
validation_question: Is the display contrast ratio at least 4000:1?

checkpoint: Projector brightness should be calculated based on screen size and ambient light
validation_question: Is projector brightness appropriate for screen gain and ambient light?

checkpoint: Viewing angle should not exceed 45 degrees from center for primary display
validation_question: Are all viewers within 45 degrees of display center?

checkpoint: Acoustical treatment should address first reflection points
validation_question: Are first reflection points treated with absorption?

checkpoint: Dante network requires dedicated VLAN with QoS enabled
validation_question: Is Dante on a dedicated VLAN with DSCP QoS?

checkpoint: Gigabit network infrastructure required for Dante
validation_question: Are all Dante network components gigabit capable?

checkpoint: PoE power budget must exceed total device draw by 25%
validation_question: Is the PoE switch budget at least 125% of total device draw?

checkpoint: Emergency evacuation audio must override all other audio sources
validation_question: Is the emergency audio system integrated with override capability?

checkpoint: Wall-mounted displays require safety tethering
validation_question: Is the display secured with a safety tether?

checkpoint: Ceiling-mounted projectors require safety cable
validation_question: Is the projector secured with a safety cable?
